content.en:
Creating an Eternal Plane is a bold idea indeed.

If it was in the outside world, the ancestors would easily know about it, then he would be in trouble.

However, this is the Dark Soul Realm, and now the ancestors can't enter it.

Therefore, if he created a time and space of annihilation in the Dark Soul Domain, the Ancestor would never be able to find out.

Besides, he didn't need to create a large area of Silence Space, he only needed to create a small piece of Silence Space.

As long as there is a Silent Annihilation Clan, it can always exist, and the Silent Annihilation Ancestor can always influence the Silent Annihilation Celebrity.

Of course, the time and space of annihilation also need energy support, if you absorb a large amount of energy from the outside world, you can continuously transform into annihilation energy, and the annihilation energy has a huge effect on the supreme domain ancestor and the supreme soul ancestor.

However, the premise is that they can withstand the erosion of the Silence Energy, and other Superior Domain Ancestors cannot withstand the erosion of the Silence Energy, and only the Ancestors can refine the Silence Energy.

But Ye Tian could refine the energy of annihilation.

"There is no shortage of resources in the Dark Soul Domain, I can completely create a small piece of the Silent Time and Space, and then integrate a large amount of resources into the Silent Time and Space. At the beginning, the reason why the Silent Annihilation Clan frantically invaded the Dark Forbidden Domain was to occupy a large amount of territory, devour the energy resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and transform it into the energy of the Silent Annihilation, so as to strengthen the Silent Annihilation Clan. "

Ye Tian muttered.

So now it's all very easy for him to do, without worrying about being discovered by the ancestors.

Anyway, those low-level resources are useless to him, it is better to use waste and convert them into extinguishing energy, which is a way to quickly improve his cultivation.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Do what you think.

Ye Tian chose the Ten Directions Saint Realm, and then blocked an area, not allowing anyone to enter, not even the invincible domain ancestors of the human race.

Then, he began to cast the Ancestral Endowment of Silence.

This replica body was also given the Ancestral Endowment of Silence by the Body, so it can affect the time and space here.

Bang!!!!!

A space-time region was invaded by the Silent Ancestor, and a special space-time region was gradually formed.

At first, this space-time region was small, but gradually it grew to the size of a universe.

"Almost, such a large range is enough!"

The time and space of annihilation were created, and they also need to be stabilized, otherwise they will gradually disappear.

In the following days, Ye Tian integrated a large amount of resources into this piece of Silent Time and Space, and used the Silent Ancestor Fu to smelt these energies and increase the power of this Silent Time and Space.

From the beginning, the extinguishing energy of this piece of Silent Time and Space was extremely thin, but it gradually became richer.

Even if there is no Silence Treasure, absorbing Silence Energy in this Silence Time and Space is many times faster than cultivating in the outside world.

Under the accumulation of massive resources, this piece of Silence Time and Space has finally given birth to the Treasure of Silence.

Airplanes!!!!

Somewhere in the Void Plane, a flower was born.

"Silence extinguishing blood flowers, medium-grade extinguishing treasures, good harvest!"

Ye Tian waited for some years, and when this flower bloomed and grew, he plucked it.

In the following days, one after another Annihilation Treasures were born, all of which fell into Ye Tian's hands, and no one snatched them from him.

And the Dark Soul Domain continued to give birth to a large number of treasures, almost all of which fell into the hands of the human race, and most of the resources in the human race were concentrated on Ye Tian.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not lack resources at all, and devoted all of them to the time and space of annihilation.

With enough Silent Annihilation Treasures, Ye Tian began to refine the Silent Annihilation Treasures, refine his soul, and improve his cultivation.

After only tens of millions of years, Ye Tian's cultivation had been promoted to the middle stage of the Supreme Soul Ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, billions of years have passed in the Dark Soul Domain.

At this time, the Dark Soul Domain still had not given birth to a second Supreme Soul Ancestor, and Ye Tian's cultivation had been promoted to the peak realm of the Supreme Soul Ancestor with the help of the Silent Annihilation Treasure, which was consistent with the ontological cultivation.

"Hahaha, I don't care about the foundation, if I become an ancestor casually, I really hope to become an ancestor within a realm year!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And if the ancestors want to enter the Dark Soul Domain, I am afraid that it will take a hundred realm years.

A hundred realm years is not too long for the ancestors, which ancestor has not cultivated to survive a million realm years so far?

But for Ye Tian, within a hundred realms, no matter how rubbish he was, he had already become an ancestor.

Of course, the ontology pursues the most powerful ancestor, so it will not rush to break through, and if it wants to create the most powerful ancestor method, it will break through the ancestor.

"The next few days are to deduce a batch of ancestral techniques, cultivate the ancestral techniques to the consummation realm, and then start cultivating the space ancestor method!"

Ye Tian decided.

Once he breaks through to the Ancestor Realm with the help of the Space Ancestor Method, then he is the Space Ancestor, and he becomes the Space Ancestor in the Dark Soul Domain, even if he is a future, he can control a small part of the power of the Dark Soul Domain and exert great strength.

However, in the cultivation of a hundred realm years, the strength will be even stronger, and there is definitely hope to resist the Destruction Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor.

Once the Dark Soul Domain is used as a foundation, the strength of the human race will reach a terrifying level.

Moreover, the Xuanxu Saint Realm can definitely become a dark holy land in the future.

Time passes.

In the blink of an eye, 100 billion years have passed.

At this time, the Dark Soul Domain has already given birth to hundreds of Superior Soul Ancestors, most of them are local residents, after all, at the beginning of the birth of the Dark Soul Domain, it was too easy for the local residents to cultivate, but it will be difficult to give birth to so many Superior Soul Ancestors in the future, which is also the benefit of the Dark Holy Land at the beginning of its birth.

These peerless soul ancestors are all in the early stage, and if they want to advance to the middle stage, I am afraid that they can only wait for the great opportunity after a trillion years.

Moreover, in a trillion years, many treasures will be born that allow the Peerless Domain Ancestor to quickly improve his strength.

However, what no one knew was that at this time, Ye Tian had already cultivated a large number of ancestral techniques to the consummation realm, and his cultivation had reached the extreme of a peerless soul ancestor, and he even began to refine his physical body, wanting to achieve something in his physical body.

However, this step is too difficult, once you become a peerless soul ancestor, your physical body is almost soul-transforming, and you can't have such a terrifying physical body like a peerless domain ancestor.

But it's quite normal.

Because the Supreme Domain Ancestor had no way to possess the soul of the Supreme Soul Ancestor, it was too difficult for the two to be completely combined.

And in the past 100 billion years, Ye Tian has also begun to comprehend the Space Ancestor Method, and has now comprehended one-fifth.

Once he waited for a trillion years, he would definitely be able to thoroughly comprehend the Spatial Ancestor Method, and he would be able to step into the Ancestor Realm with a single thought.

"Then wait for a trillion years to break through to the Ancestor Realm and shock those Ancestors!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.
